expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: review loop does not silently drop evidence-backed nodes
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly states the benchmark focus and evaluates it: "Benchmark focus: review loop does not silently drop evidence-backed nodes" and includes a dedicated section "Does the provided evidence demonstrate Phase 5a prevents silent dropping?" plus it enumerates "Evidence-backed nodes that were previously missed (should not be 'dropped' in review)".

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase5a
expectations.evidence: result.md is structured around Phase 5a requirements and artifacts: "Primary phase under test: Phase 5a" and "What Phase 5a must enforce" with required outputs (review_notes, review_delta, drafts/qa_plan_phase5a_r<round>.md) and the acceptance gate ("End review_delta with... accept or return phase5a" / "Block accept if..."). It also states: "this result is framed around Phase 5a’s required artifacts and acceptance gate as defined by references/review-rubric-phase5a.md..."
